top_signals.title: Brent Climbs Past $85, Treasuries Extend Losses: Markets Wrap
top_signals.summary: Oil extended gains and Treasuries edged lower after the standoff between the US and Iran intensified, raising concern that supply disruptions will reignite inflation and strengthen the case for higher interest rates.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Commodity repricing impacting inflation expectations and industrial supply chains.
